title: gmp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:6.2.1-12]
- Release bump due to internal issue with the build system (missing debug symbols)
  Related: RHEL-24118

[1:6.2.1-11]
- Port the ibm z13 optimization patches
  Resolves: RHEL-24118
full_text:
